title: 28mm x 100mm Flat Plastic Glazing Packers (1-6mm) Durable Shim Spacers for DIY, Home Improvement, Window, and Door Frame Installations (Mixed Pack of 42)
features: Versatile Thickness Options: Includes 42/90/200/1,000 glazing packers in a range of thicknesses from 1mm to 6mm, providing flexibility for precise leveling and alignment in various projects.
Durable Plastic Construction: Made from high-quality, robust plastic for long-lasting use in both indoor and outdoor installations, ensuring strength and reliability.
Ideal for DIY & Professional Use: Perfect for home improvement tasks such as window and door frame installations, flooring, tiling, and cabinetry, suitable for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals.
Compact & Easy to Use: The 28mm x 100mm size fits easily into tight spaces while offering strong support, making these packers ideal for intricate projects.
Cost-Effective Solution: Provides a reliable and affordable way to achieve professional-grade accuracy in leveling, spacing, and aligning surfaces, helping you complete your projects efficiently.
description: Product Description Six Sizes, One Reliable Solution Built to Support. Designed to Last. Includes 1–6mm packers for precise spacing and leveling. Perfect for windows, doors, and general DIY. Made from strong, durable plastic that won’t crack or compress—ideal for professional results every time. Perfect for PVC Window Installations Professional Results Made Easy Designed for trade and DIY use, Evoges glazing packers make window fitting faster, cleaner, and more accurate. Ideal for PVC frames, each shim ensures precise alignment and lasting support—helping you get the job done right the first time. Labelled for Speed. Textured for Grip Precision You Can See and Feel Each packer is clearly labelled with its size for quick identification. The textured anti-slip surface helps keep it firmly in place during fitting—making window, door, and frame installations faster, easier, and more accurate. Versatile Shims for Every Project Previous page Even Floors Start Here Ensures tiles are spaced evenly and maintains a consistent grout line throughout. A reliable alternative to traditional tile levelling spacers for a smooth, professional finish. Perfect Spacing for a Flawless Finish Functions as an effective alternative to tile leveling spacers—helping maintain consistent gaps and level surfaces for a flawless tile finish every time. Fine Adjustments Made Simple Achieve perfect alignment when fitting cabinets, worktops, and shelves. Evoges glazing packers offer reliable spacing where millimetres matter, making installation fast, clean, and hassle-free. Next page From flooring to tiling to cabinetry, Evoges glazing packers go beyond window installations. Durable, easy to use, and available in multiple sizes—these multipurpose shims are essential for accurate spacing and leveling across a range of home improvement tasks. Tough Under Pressure Built from high-strength plastic that won’t crack, compress, or deform—no matter the load. Evoges glazing packers are made to handle the demands of window and door installations, ensuring reliable, long-lasting support every time. Full Range for Total Flexibility Includes 6 clearly defined thicknesses: 1mm to 6mm. Easily select the right size for every task—from fine adjustments to larger gaps. Ideal for precise spacing in window and door frames, flooring, and general construction projects. 1 2 3 4 5 6 Trusted by Installers Across the UK Precision Where It Matters Most Whether aligning frames or adjusting gaps, Evoges glazing packers deliver the accuracy and strength professionals rely on. Quick to position and built to last, they’re the go-to solution for efficient, high-quality installations.
